summary: Comprehensive testing of Personal Finance Tracker security migration. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Major security migration from frontend Supabase to backend FastAPI with JWT auth verified. Bug fixes confirmed: Hebrew year view shows transactions, delete updates all-time stats immediately.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to Resend domain verification requirement - expected limitation
minor.note: Resend requires domain verification to send emails to non-owner addresses

minor.issue: Email sending fails for non-verified domains - expected Resend limitation

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Valid credentials returns JWT token and user without password_hash
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid email returns 401
Backend: GET /api/transactions - Valid token returns user's transactions
Backend: GET /api/transactions - No token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/transactions - Invalid token returns 401
Backend: POST /api/transactions - Create transaction with valid token
Backend: DELETE /api/transactions/{id} - Delete transaction with valid token
Backend: DELETE /api/transactions/{id} - No token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/user/settings - Returns settings without password_hash
Backend: GET /api/user/settings - No token returns 401
Backend: PUT /api/user/settings - Update settings with valid token
Backend: GET /api/transactions/suggestions - Returns deduplicated suggestions
Backend: GET /api/transactions/suggestions - No token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/currency/rates/USD - Returns live exchange rates
Backend: POST /api/cron/monthly-summary - Endpoint exists and functional
Security: Frontend .env does NOT contain SUPABASE_KEY or SUPABASE_URL
Security: password_hash never exposed in API responses
Frontend: Login via server-side auth works (no Supabase key in frontend)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with transactions via API
Frontend: Settings modal shows Default Maaser Percentage with Save button
Frontend: Settings modal shows Calendar Mode (Gregorian/Hebrew) toggle
Frontend: Settings modal shows Distribution Mode (Give & Lend / Give Only)
Frontend: Contact modal opens with pre-filled name and email
Frontend: View mode buttons work (All, Year, Month)
Frontend: Hebrew calendar year view shows transactions (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Frontend: Delete transaction updates all-time stats immediately (BUG FIX VERIFIED)
Frontend: Accordion transaction groups collapse/expand
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Transaction ID type changed from int to str in backend endpoints (Supabase uses UUID)
Fixed: maaser_percentage converted to int before sending to Supabase (column is integer type)
ESLint warnings in AddTransactionModal.js and Dashboard.js about missing useEffect dependencies - minor, not breaking
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed txn_id type from int to str for update/delete endpoints
/app/backend/server.py - Added int conversion for maaser_percentage before Supabase insert
/app/backend/tests/test_auth_and_transactions.py - New comprehensive auth and transactions test file
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_pytest_transaction during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security migration complete: All Supabase DB operations moved from frontend to backend FastAPI with JWT auth. Frontend no longer has Supabase keys. Key bug fixes verified: 1) Hebrew year view now shows transactions correctly using getHebrewYearBounds(), 2) Delete transaction updates all-time stats immediately (not just period stats). Backend endpoints fixed: txn_id changed from int to str (Supabase uses UUID), maaser_percentage converted to int before insert. Email endpoints return 500 due to Resend domain verification - this is expected.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Transaction ID type mismatch - endpoints expected int but Supabase returns UUID strings
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed txn_id parameter type from int to str in update_transaction and delete_transaction endpoints

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: maaser_percentage sent as float (10.0) but Supabase column expects integer
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added int() conversion for maaser_percentage before sending to Supabase in create and update endpoints
